$comment: Externalized configuration for the gcp-mcp-setup skill. No endpoints, projects, or paths are hardcoded in the instructions or scripts — edit them here.

token_source.notes: gcloud-user is simplest on a dev workstation/VM. Use adc or an attached service account for headless/CI contexts.

endpoint_directory.notes: Canonical, continuously-updated list of all Google Cloud / Google / Workspace MCP endpoints. Fetch this to resolve a product name to a URL or confirm an endpoint exists. It supersedes known_servers below, which is only an offline hint cache.

known_servers.$note: Offline hint cache only — the endpoint_directory URL above is authoritative and current. Do not treat this list as complete.

developer-knowledge.notes: Doc search across Google developer products (Android, Chrome, Firebase, Flutter, Go, Google Cloud, Gemini/AI, Maps, Web, etc.). Handshake is public; tool calls need a bearer token + x-goog-user-project.
